Test Case Title: Verify that login should work with valid email and password
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Sign in
Expected Result: User should be logged in successfully and redirected to dashboard

Test Case Title: Verify that login should fail with invalid email format
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter invalid email format (abc@, abc.com)
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Sign in
Expected Result: System should show "Invalid email" error

Test Case Title: Verify that login should fail with incorrect password
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter incorrect password
4. Click Sign in
Expected Result: System should show "Invalid credentials" error

Test Case Title: Verify that login should fail with unregistered email
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter unregistered email
3. Enter any password
4. Click Sign in
Expected Result: System should show "User not found" error

Test Case Title: Verify that email and password fields should not accept blank values
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Leave email & password blank
3. Click Sign in
Expected Result: System should show "Email required" and "Password required" messages

Test Case Title: Verify that password field should mask the entered characters
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Type password in password field
Expected Result: Password characters should be masked with dots or asterisks

Test Case Title: Verify that clicking "Forgot Password?" should redirect to reset password screen
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Click "Forgot Password?"
Expected Result: User should be redirected to reset password page

Test Case Title: Verify that "Remember Me" should keep user logged in after browser restart
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Select "Remember Me" checkbox
4. Click Sign in
5. Close and reopen browser
6. Navigate back to site
Expected Result: User should remain logged in

Test Case Title: Verify that "Remember Me" unchecked should not keep user logged in
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Do not select "Remember Me"
4. Sign in
5. Close and reopen browser
Expected Result: User should be logged out

Test Case Title: Verify that user should not log in with empty email and filled password
Steps to Execute:
1. Leave email blank
2. Enter valid password
3. Click Sign in
Expected Result: Error "Email required" should be shown

Test Case Title: Verify that user should not log in with filled email and empty password
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter valid email
2. Leave password blank
3. Click Sign in
Expected Result: Error "Password required" should be shown

Test Case Title: Verify that login page should allow pressing "Enter" key to submit
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter valid credentials
2. Press Enter
Expected Result: Login should be successful

Test Case Title: Verify that session should expire after logout
Steps to Execute:
1. Log in with valid credentials
2. Click Logout
3. Click back button in browser
Expected Result: User should not return to dashboard, should redirect to login page

Test Case Title: Verify that system should lock account after multiple failed attempts
Steps to Execute: 1. Enter valid email with wrong password 5 times
Expected Result: Account should be locked with security message

Test Case Title: Verify that "Sign in using SSO" should redirect to SSO login
Steps to Execute:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Click "Sign in using SSO"
Expected Result: User should be redirected to SSO authentication page

Test Case Title: Verify that login should not allow script injection in email field
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter <script>alert(1)</script> in email field
2. Enter valid password
3. Click Sign in
Expected Result: System should escape script and show error

Test Case Title: Verify that login should not allow SQL injection in email field
Steps to Execute:
1. Enter ' OR '1'='1 in email
2. Any password
3. Click Sign in
Expected Result: System should block SQL injection attempt

Test Case Title: Verify that login page should display proper placeholders in fields
Steps to Execute: 1. Navigate to login page
Expected Result: Email field should show "Email address", password field "Password"

Test Case Title: Verify that login page should be accessible via secure HTTPS
Steps to Execute: 1. Check browser address bar
Expected Result: Page should load with HTTPS and valid SSL certificate

Test Case Title: Verify that password field should support copy-paste restriction (if implemented)
Steps to Execute: 1. Try to copy-paste password in/out
Expected Result: System should allow/deny based on design

Test Case Title: Verify that "Start a free trial" link should redirect to registration page
Steps to Execute: 1. Click "Start a free trial"
Expected Result: User should be redirected to sign-up page

Test Case Title: Verify that login should log timestamp and IP for auditing
Steps to Execute: 1. Log in with valid credentials
Expected Result: System should log timestamp & IP in backend

Test Case Title: Verify that login should maintain session timeout after inactivity
Steps to Execute:
1. Log in
2. Stay idle for set time (e.g., 15 min)
3. Try using app
Expected Result: System should log out after inactivity timeout

Test Case Title: Verify that multiple users should be able to log in on different browsers
Steps to Execute:
1. Log in with same credentials on Chrome
2. Log in with same credentials on Firefox
Expected Result: Both sessions should be allowed (or restricted per policy)

Test Case Title: Verify that login page UI elements should be aligned properly
Steps to Execute: 1. Navigate to login page
Expected Result: All fields, buttons, and links should be aligned and visible properly
